title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: OOB write in JsonParser due to dangling GC callback
bounty_rationale: below baseline / speculative report of V8 sandbox bypass that resulted in a security beneficial change
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
During construction of a `JsonParser`, a [GCEpilogueCallback is registered](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:v8/src/json/json-parser.cc;drc=feaf4438bcf1f96868820e62254495bfa46d3ea0;l=327) based on the type of the string (depending on whether it is e
